description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the continuumio/miniconda3:latest Docker image. Define a global before_script that runs apt update, installs build-essential and curl non‑interactively, installs pip packages from requirements.txt and pytest, installs unzip, creates the $GLPK_CACHE_DIR directory, and if the GLPK binary is not cached downloads http://ftp.gnu.org/gnu/glpk/glpk-4.65.tar.gz, extracts it, runs ./configure, make, make check and make install. Cache the .cache/glpk and .cache/pip paths, and set the variables GLPK_CACHE_DIR, LD_LIBRARY_PATH and PIP_CACHE_DIR accordingly. Add a test job (default test stage) named test that simply executes pytest. The pipeline has no services, artifacts, or conditional rules and runs on all branches.
